liveWindowIntroBody: Test prices here before you publish them. Compare the current price, the profit you expect, and the price you would need to hit your target.
livePriceCardBoxHelper: Use this view to see what a full box sale would return.
livePriceCardItemHelper: Use this view to test a price for one item at a time.
livePriceCardNeededPriceSummaryPrefix: To hit your profit target, the remaining units need to average about
livePriceCardNeededProfitSummaryLabel: At that price, your total lot profit would be
livePriceCardNoTargetLabel: Set a profit target to see the average price you still need from here.
livePriceCardRandomHitHelper: Use this view when you want to price one standout item instead of the whole box.
liveSinglesBundleSuggestionLabel: Suggested from fees and target profit
liveSinglesEmptyStateBody: No items selected yet. Search above to add the items you want to price.
liveSinglesPanelIntro: Add items, then choose whether to price them one by one or as a bundle.
liveSinglesSearchPlaceholder: Type a name or item number, then tap to add it.
